improvement_notes: 문서 충돌은 해소했으나 git 저장소가 아니어서 브랜치 기반 검증과 diff 검증은 수행하지 못함.
보고서 및 품질 점수 게이트를 중심 문서에 명확히 반영함. 실제 운영 드라이런은 후속 확인 필요.
권한, non-git 운영, 세션 로그, stale 문서, 자동 감사 스크립트 개선을 모두 반영하고 3개 검사 스크립트 PASS를 확인함.
Legacy report already recorded 100점 / 100점 (S등급); this row backfills the machine-readable quality ledger for strict completion gates.
원장/알림/Task Spec 정합성 개선을 모두 반영하고 세 감사 스크립트 PASS를 확인함. Legacy warning은 이력 보존상 남음.
Tier 2/3 완료 게이트, git dirty 상태 검사, notify script 권한, legacy warning suppression metadata를 반영하고 감사 스크립트 3종 PASS 및 validate-ledger warning 0건을 확인함.
세션 다음 단계 stale 문제를 문서 규칙과 자동 완료 게이트로 보강했고, task 브랜치 커밋 및 main squash merge 절차까지 진행 대상으로 포함함.
PowerShell Git 명령, squash merge 순서, self-referential commit hash 처리, origin ahead 인수인계 규칙을 가이드에 반영하고 감사 스크립트 3종 PASS를 확인함.
대표 보고용 품질 점수를 JSON 대신 쉬운 요약과 표 중심으로 바꾸고 템플릿과 루브릭에 반영함.
Active Task completion gate, Task Spec SSOT audit, quality score recent-average check, document class guidance, single audit command, and push completion rules were implemented and audited.
파일 변경이 있으면 session_log_skipped_reason 사용 불가 조건을 금지 형태로 명시. 단일 파일 수정, 재시도 없음.
Tier 1 기본 commit+push 정책 추가. git-branch-policy.md 및 CURRENT_STATE.md 반영.
commit/merge/push 세트 규칙 전면 반영. 조건부 push 규칙 삭제. git-branch-policy.md, work-history-policy.md, CURRENT_STATE.md 일관 수정.
헤더 전수 확인 → 변경 파일만 조건부 체크로 완화. Tier 1 단순 작업 원장 파일 생략 예외 추가.
analyst.md에 Researcher spawn 절차+프롬프트 템플릿+결과처리표 추가. researcher.md에 서브에이전트/독립 실행 모드 구분 추가.
세션 로그 갱신 누락 반복 — 감점 처리. tier-classification.md, ARCHITECTURE.md 예외 조항 추가는 정확함.
기존 audit:harness 실패를 원인별로 분리해 보정했고, work-history-policy.md에 구조화 artifact_refs, JSONL 파싱, VALIDATION_RESULT/MERGE_COMPLETED/quality_score 필수 기록 규칙을 추가했다.
The isolated Claude CLI Generator handoff contract, allowed/forbidden context rules, JSON schema, and example input were documented and validated. Runtime wrapper automation remains a follow-up task.

Claude Code CLI guides, Generator execution wrapper, model/effort/permission defaults, Researcher procedure, and Failure Handling automation boundaries were documented and validated. Validator loop automation remains a follow-up task.

Generator wrapper was hardened based on Claude CLI review: default model alias changed to opus, system prompt separated from handoff stdin, refs validated, lockfile added, git write made opt-in, and stderr handling documented. Actual Claude CLI generation and Validator automation remain follow-up work.

Generator wrapper now enforces task branch execution, task-scoped output path, JSON/schema validation, markdown handoff restriction, and target file scope checks. Validator/retry automation remains pending user approval of the proposed design.

Post-task operational insight capture was connected to logs/insights.jsonl, context management, work history completion rules, and Analyst responsibilities. Future work can add an audit script gate for insight_capture metadata.

Branch cleanup policy upgraded from --merged ancestor check to squash tree equivalence. New scripts/clean-merged-task-branches.mjs cleaned 4 orphan branches; one (TASK-20260427-092) retained due to tree diff and flagged for manual review. Algorithm verified to handle squash workflow correctly; rebase/cherry-pick coverage is follow-up.

Coupled fix for two separate problems: squash policy edge case (TASK-20260428-006) and insight log volatility. Future strengthening: gate could verify the applied_to_doc.commit actually contains a diff to target_doc.

Added a concrete CLI transport metadata encoding rule to tool-permissions.md, updated CURRENT_STATE.md, and avoided persisting raw session metadata from the reported error. Remaining operational recommendation: move or clone the workspace to an ASCII-only path to avoid recurrence.

Implemented Validator-A wrapper and retry handoff automation with dry-run validation, resource-failure separation, generated retry input, and repeated-failure Conflict Report. Actual external Codex Validator execution remains for the first real downstream task.

Implemented focused review hardening: resolved SELF_REFERENTIAL insight placeholder through an append-only resolver, enforced resolver-aware completion gates with target_doc commit verification, added pre-dispatch handoff secret scanning, and wired retry schema regression validation into harness audit.

Generator real run succeeded after 6 failed attempts isolated --bare flag as silent OAuth skip cause. Wrapper fix applied in same Task. Two gotcha insights captured under new schema with applied_to_doc enforced. Trade-off accepted: --bare removal weakens context isolation; future hardening Task may revisit. Validator-A external execution deferred to separate session per user request. Cost summary: $0.47 total (diagnostic + actual deliverable).

Fixed Generator wrapper output parsing to prefer Claude structured_output and safely synthesize generator-result.json from natural-language reports only when target-file git diff verification passes. Added audit fixture coverage and reconstructed TASK-009 missing Generator result artifact with provenance.

Updated Generator pipeline guide automation status, appended push-status corrections for TASK-010/011, and added check-final-git-state.mjs with audit:harness and audit:finalize coverage. Actual model smoke test intentionally split to TASK-015.

Generator real smoke execution succeeded and produced generator-result.json plus smoke-target.md. Validator-A real execution could not complete because Codex CLI could not be spawned from Node on Windows (codex ENOENT, codex.cmd EINVAL, extensionless shim ENOENT). Resource Failure was recorded instead of being treated as FAIL.

Converted TASK-015 smoke findings into wrapper enforcement, guide updates, long-term insights, and a completion-gate guard against report-only closure of reusable guide/wrapper/process defects. Live Codex Validator-A rerun was not part of this task.

Directly reran real Validator-A smoke after TASK-016. Windows shim mediation worked, then current Codex CLI surfaced two additional compatibility issues: approval policy flag ordering and strict structured-output schema requirements. Both were fixed in wrapper/schema/guides, and attempt 3 returned Validator-A PASS.

Promoted agent-by-agent activity log to standard report format. Updated output-formats.md and TASK-EXAMPLE.md authority docs. TASK-018 own report self-applies the new format as the first living example. Legacy reports (TASK-001~017) preserved. Future improvement: rerun retro after first 5 new-format reports for tone calibration.

Recorded and acknowledged a real process violation: the assistant answered a new operational proposal before creating TASK_CREATED. Correction ledger and report were added append-only. Significant deduction because the rule violation should have been prevented before the answer.

First end-to-end Researcher external_cli_fallback + image generation full pipeline. Codex CLI image_gen.imagegen built-in skill confirmed working with gpt-image-2 default. Live LandingHub fetch was blocked by Codex sandbox, transparently flagged in confidence rationale. Korean verbatim text rendering succeeded. Future improvement: standardize live-site fetch fallback (user pre-fetch into handoff allowed_context) and image asset storage policy (gitignore vs LFS vs external).
Corrected agent role boundary in 4 authority docs single Task. TASK-020 ledger received CORRECTION. Legacy reports preserved per scope discipline.
